title: Offenses During Employment and Corresponding Penalties
content:
1. Smuggling or violation of customs rules and regulations:
  a. Smuggling taxable items:
    - 1st Offense: Suspension from overseas employment program (6 months to 1 year)
    - 2nd Offense: Suspension (1 year and 1 day to 2 years)
    - 3rd Offense: Permanent disqualification
  b. Possession/use of prohibited drugs, narcotics, contraband:
    - Same penalties as (a)
  c. Gun-running or possession of explosives:
    - Same penalties as (a)
  d. Abetting or conniving to commit smuggling:
    - Same penalties as (a)
  e. Misdeclaration or failure to declare articles leading to seizure and fine to ship:
    - Same penalties as (a)
  f. Misdeclaration or failure to declare articles leading to seizure but ship not implicated:
    - Same penalties as (a)
  g. Possession of pornographic materials leading to confiscation and fine to ship:
    - Same penalties as (a)
  h. Possession of child pornography materials leading to confiscation and fine to ship:
    - Same penalties as (a)
  i. Any other violation not implicating the ship:
    - Same penalties as (a)
  j. Any other violation implicating the ship:
    - 1st Offense: Suspension (1 to 2 years)
    - 2nd Offense: Suspension (2 years and 1 day to 3 years)
    - 3rd Offense: Permanent disqualification

2. Desertion:
  a. Deserting or attempting to desert:
    - 1st Offense: Permanent disqualification
  b. Advising, assisting or persuading another to desert:
    - 1st Offense: Suspension (2 to 3 years)
    - 2nd Offense: Permanent disqualification

3. Abandoning or leaving post without relief:
  - 1st Offense: Suspension (1 to 2 years)
  - 2nd Offense: Suspension (2 years and 1 day to 3 years)
  - 3rd Offense: Permanent disqualification

4. Leaving ship without permission:
  - Same penalties as (3)

5. Entrusting duties to others without authority:
  - Same penalties as (3)

6. Sleeping on post while on duty:
  - Same penalties as (3)

7. Insubordination:
  a. Disobedience to lawful orders:
    - 1st Offense: Suspension (1 to 2 years)
    - 2nd Offense: Suspension (2 years and 1 day to 3 years)
    - 3rd Offense: Permanent disqualification
  b. Attempting to assault superior officer:
    - 1st Offense: Suspension (6 months to 1 year)
    - 2nd Offense: Suspension (1 year and 1 day to 3 years)
    - 3rd Offense: Permanent disqualification
  c. Assaulting superior officer/others without deadly weapon:
    - 1st Offense: Suspension (1 to 2 years)
    - 2nd Offense: Suspension (2 years and 1 day to 3 years)
    - 3rd Offense: Permanent disqualification
  d. Assaulting superior officer/others with deadly weapon:
    - 1st Offense: Permanent disqualification
  e. Disrespect towards superior officer:
    - Same penalties as (a)
  f. Insulting superior officer by words or deed:
    - Same penalties as (a)
  g. Inciting another to commit insubordination:
    - Same penalties as (a) except 3rd Offense marked as permanent disqualification

8. Drunkenness:
  a. Drunk while on duty:
    - 1st Offense: Suspension (1 to 2 years)
    - 2nd Offense: Suspension (2 years and 1 day to 3 years)
    - 3rd Offense: Permanent disqualification
  b. Creating trouble on board due to intoxication:
    - Same penalties as (a)
  c. Failure to perform assigned jobs due to intoxication:
    - Same penalties as (a)

9. Creating trouble outside ship premises unjustly implicating ship:
  - 1st Offense: Suspension (1 to 2 years)
  - 2nd Offense: Suspension (2 years and 1 day to 3 years)
  - 3rd Offense: Permanent disqualification
